name: Gust
short_description: A short retro speedrun game in a dark world. Use your spells to deflect and solve puzzle elements.
detailed_description:
Deflect powerful monsters to progress through the game using simple mechanics.

+Challenging levels with puzzle elements.

+THERES NO SAVE. With the expectancy of a 40 minutes playthrough. Lowered to around 10 minutes if you get good.

Use "GUST" to slow enemies down and move obstacles, extinguish packs of monsters with "FLAMES" and damage long range targets with "ICELANCE". Don't forget that everything is stronger, faster or neverending, so main goal is to run and reach the end as fast as possible.

*This is an indie project. If you like pay once play forever type of games with cool mechanics, SUPPORT US, we are doing a longer project!



She euthanized a lot, helping desperately sick people die. So she was exiled to the land infested by the demons.
Fighting was mostly futile but her spells Gust, Scorch and Icicle were helpful.
She was not expected to survive it as it was her punishment for euthanizing sick countrymen, taking gods gift in unnatural ways.
